requirement_topic.en: Cell and battery pack safety requirements under TIS 2879-2560
requirement_topic.zh: TIS 2879-2560框架下的电芯与电池组安全要求
requirement_topic.zht: TIS 2879-2560框架下的電芯與電池組安全要求

summary.en: Lithium battery cells, packs, and power banks sold in Thailand must satisfy the relevant TIS-specified safety requirements, including electrical and abuse-condition tests and marking logic. Power-bank scope commonly references TIS 2879-2560 aligned to IEC 62133 approaches. Thai distributors and importers normally need evidence in Thai language context and ensure the in-country licence holder can demonstrate dossier ownership.
summary.zh: 销售到泰国的锂电芯、电池组和移动电源必须满足相应的TIS安全要求，包括电气及滥用工况测试和标识规则。移动电源通常按TIS 2879-2560在IEC 62133体系下处理。泰国经销或进口环节通常要求可由境内许可持有人出具责任证明，相关技术资料需符合泰国本地提交语境。
summary.zht: 銷售到泰國的鋰電芯、電池組與行動電源必須滿足相應的TIS安全要求，包含電氣及濫用工況測試和標識規則。行動電源通常按TIS 2879-2560在IEC 62133體系下處理。泰國經銷或進口環節通常要求可由境內許可持有人出具責任證明，相關技術資料需符合泰國本地提交語境。

standards_or_laws: TIS 2879-2560 — Lithium battery pack safety framework used for certain portable lithium battery products
TISI safety marking and safety documentation rules for mandatory categories
Thai Customs import documentation templates used for mandatory mark-linked goods

summary.en: China relies on GB 31241-2022 and related GB/GB/T testing routes for portable lithium products. GB 31241 is a national implementation family related to IEC principles. China may also apply factory controls and CCC-linked conformity evidence domestically, but those documents are not Thailand-only TIS substitutes.
summary.zh: 中国依赖GB 31241-2022及相关GB/GB/T测试路线覆盖便携式锂电产品。GB 31241为基于IEC原则的国家实施体系。中国还会结合工厂控制与CCC等国内合格性依据，但这些文件通常不能直接作为泰国TIS文件替代。
summary.zht: 中國依賴GB 31241-2022及相關GB/GB/T測試路線覆蓋便攜式鋰電產品。GB 31241為基於IEC原則的國家實施體系。中國還會結合工廠控制與CCC等國內合格性依據，但這些文件通常不能直接作為泰國TIS文件替代。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) system under CNCA where category applies

gap.en: The critical gap is not test style language alone but acceptability in Thailand. Chinese GB reports are often generated for domestic market interpretation and may not match Thai evaluator expectations on marking scope, in-country dossier ownership, and importer-facing file format. Exporters typically bridge this by creating a Thailand-aligned package mapped to TIS categories before launch.
gap.zh: 关键差距不只在测试方法语言，而在于泰国端可接受性。中国GB报告多用于国内解读，常与泰国对标识范围、境内持有人责任、进口方文件格式要求不完全一致。出口商通常需要在上市前建立与TIS类别对应的泰国版文件包。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距不只在測試方法語言，而在於泰國端可接受性。中國GB報告多用於國內解讀，常與泰國對標識範圍、境內持有人責任、進口方文件格式要求不完全一致。出口商通常需要在上市前建立與TIS品類對應的泰國版文件包。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the relevant product group is within Thailand's controlled scope and TIS marking route.
mandatory_status.cn: No mandatory TIS equivalence; GB/CCC compliance remains a China domestic pathway.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For safety, Chinese GB test reports are useful baseline evidence but are informational only for Thai placement. Exporters should expect Thailand-facing repackaging of conclusions into TIS-compatible evidence and ensure the Thai importer/licence holder owns the conformity pathway.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在安全方面，中国GB测试报告可作为有用的底层依据，但仅供信息用途。出口商通常需要将结论转为TIS兼容证据形式，并确保泰国进口商/许可持有人接管并拥有合规路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在安全方面，中國GB測試報告可作為有用的底層依據，但僅供資訊用途。出口商通常需要將結論轉為TIS兼容證據形式，並確保泰國進口商/許可持有人接管並擁有合規路徑。
